case_title: VALERIE WILLINGHAM VS. SAN FRANCISCO MUSEUM OF MODERN ART, CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLINGHAM, VALERIE AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUSEUM OF MODERN ART, CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-01-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-27-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-17-2012
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-01-2012 CONTINUED TO SEP-12-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-23-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-12-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-23-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $325.00 AGAINST LAWRENCE MOY, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-23-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-13-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-23-2012 CONTINUED TO DEC-11-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-11-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST LAWRENCE MOY, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-11-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-27-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-11-2012 CONTINUED TO JAN-29-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-29-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST LAWRENCE MOY, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-29-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-13-2013. NOTE: SANCTIONS PREVIOUSLY ISSUED TO LAWRENCE MOY, ESQ. IN THE AMOUNT OF $325.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE OCT-23-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AND IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE DEC-11-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ARE ALSO DUE. TOTAL AMOUNT DUE $1025.00. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2013 CONTINUED TO MAR-26-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S), AND PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. **NOTE: IF THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE, ANSWER OR DEFAULT AS TO DEFENDANT(S), AND NO APPEARANCE BY COUNSEL AT THE MAR-26-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING, THE COURT INTENDS TO DISMISS THE MATTER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-26-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-26-2013 CONTINUED TO APR-16-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 206 FOR FAILURE TO FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S), AND PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. **NOTE: IF THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE, ANSWER OR DEFAULT AS TO DEFENDANT(S), AND NO APPEARANCE BY COUNSEL AT THE APR-16-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING, THE COURT INTENDS TO DISMISS THE MATTER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. (610)

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING APR-16-2013 AT 9:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-16-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-16-2013 CONTINUED TO MAY-16-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 206 FOR FAILURE TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. ***NOTICE OF IMPENDING REFERRAL TO THE STATE BAR AS REQUIRED BY BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE SECTION 6086.7 (A) (3).
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. AMENDED NOTICE TO CORRECT PROOF OF SERVICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF WILLINGHAM, VALERIE AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-16-2013 IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

parties.name: SAN FRANCISCO MUSEUM OF MODERN ART, CORPORATION

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-15-2013 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2013 Continued To May-16-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause of substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, the Court ordered that this matter be dismissed. The Court has set an Order to Show Cause to attorney Lawrence Moy on MAY-16-2013 at 9:30 am in Department 206, for failure to pay outstanding sanctions and possible referral to the State Bar.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2013 Continued To Apr-16-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The OSC is reset to APR-16-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 206 (matter transferred from D610 to D206 calendar). Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2013 Continued To Mar-26-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is reset to Mar-26-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2012 Continued To Jan-29-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is reset to JAN-29-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $325.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is reset to DEC-11-2012 at 2:00 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
